cmd: if [ -z "$N8N_API_KEY" ]; then echo NO_KEY; exit 0; fi; curl -s "https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1/workflows?limit=200" -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: $N8N_API_KEY" | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);ws=d.get('data',[]) if isinstance(d,dict) else d;print('WF_COUNT',len(ws));[print(w.get('id'),'|',w.get('active'),'|',w.get('name')) for w in ws]"
